author: Latin proverb
text: Summer, harvest, war.

author: Seneca
text: Fate leads the willing and drags the unwilling.

author: Confucius
text: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.

author: Marcus Aurelius
text: The strength of the soul lies in changing one's inner world.

author: Viktor Frankl
text: When we can no longer change a situation, we are challenged to change ourselves.

author: Carl Jung
text: What you resist persists.

author: Epictetus
text: It is not events that disturb people, but their judgments about them.

author: Ralph Waldo Emerson
text: The deepest principle in human nature is the craving to be appreciated.

author: Albert Einstein
text: In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.

author: Maya Angelou
text: People will forget what you said, but they will never forget how you made them feel.

author: Dalai Lama XIV
text: Happiness is not something ready-made. It comes from your own actions.

author: Lao Tzu
text: The journey of a thousand miles begins beneath your feet.

author: Socrates
text: The unexamined life is not worth living.

author: Aristotle
text: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence is not an act, but a habit.

author: Plato
text: The greatest thing in life is to learn how to give love and let it come in.

author: Fyodor Dostoevsky
text: Beauty will save the world.

author: Leo Tolstoy
text: All happy families are alike; each unhappy family is unhappy in its own way.

author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry
text: We are responsible for those we have tamed.

author: Mark Twain
text: The two most important days are the day you are born and the day you find out why.

author: Nelson Mandela
text: It always seems impossible until it is done.

author: Mahatma Gandhi
text: Be the change you wish to see in the world.

author: Rumi
text: The wound is the place where the light enters you.

author: Louise Hay
text: I love and approve of myself.

author: Carl Rogers
text: The more I accept myself, the more I can accept others.

author: Anne Frank
text: Despite everything, I still believe people are really good at heart.
